title: copisma glabrum
intro: Copisma glabrum, also known as the smooth copisma, is a plant species that belongs to the family Cunoniaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Copisma glabrum include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with various health conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
